transcript.content: Can you publish the warehouse stockout update to supply-review? The dashboard already has a number, but use the warehouse if that is safer.

args.query: SELECT state, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(metric_value) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN reconciled THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reconciled_cnt, MAX(loaded_at) AS latest FROM stock_events GROUP BY state;

transcript.content:
id | state | metric_value | reconciled | loaded_at
STK-cached | cached | 10 | False | 2026-04-29T08:00:00
STK-final-1 | final | 7 | True | 2026-04-30T08:00:00
STK-final-2 | final | 6 | True | 2026-04-30T08:00:00

args.query: SELECT SUM(metric_value) AS total_stockouts, COUNT(*) AS events, MAX(loaded_at) AS latest FROM stock_events WHERE state='final' AND reconciled=TRUE;
